name: RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG-16
title: No spec invariant requires .rabbit-prompt-counter / .rabbit-sync-counter to be gitignored (only declared)
description: spec.md 'Runtime Artifact Naming' section (L528-535) lists '.rabbit-prompt-counter (repo root, gitignored)' as a descriptive note but Inv 31-35 (line 538-544) do not actually mandate the gitignore entry. If someone edits .gitignore and removes these lines, no test catches it. test-RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG13-claude-md-gitignore-drift.py tests CLAUDE.md NOT in gitignore but no inverse test asserts .rabbit-* counters ARE in gitignore. Add explicit invariants + tests for the gitignore contract of every runtime marker (.rabbit-prompt-counter, .rabbit-sync-counter, .rabbit-scope-active, .rabbit-scope-active-*, .rabbit-scope-override, .rabbit-scope-override-used, .rabbit-skills-updated, .rabbit-human-approval-bypass).
